components.scope: benchmark harness, task configurations, and system-prompt templates
components.notes: The initial importer consumes only these repository-authored benchmark definitions.
SST-2/GLUE, SMS Spam, HSOL, JFLEG, Gigaword, and other upstream datasets retain their own terms.

constraints: Do not ingest the unrelated guychuk/open-prompt-injection Hugging Face dataset as an official project artifact.
Do not download or redistribute downstream task datasets through the initial importer.
Review every downstream dataset license before materializing full benchmark examples.
citations: Liu et al. (2023). Formalizing and Benchmarking Prompt Injection Attacks and Defenses. arXiv:2310.12815.
